---
title: "Topic Studies"
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| echo: false
#| message: false
#| warning: false

source(here::here("_chapter-setup.R"))
```

## Runway Slot Pressure

:::{.callout-note}
This section is work in progress. It will analyse enabled throughput based on runway system configurations.
:::

## Horizontal Flight Efficiency

:::{.callout-note}
Brazil has implemented the HFE algorithm. Similar to previous years, this topic will form an expansion of the report in a later drafting step.
:::

## Summary

Topic-study findings will be added as the analyses are folded into the report.
